description:
Perform a system health audit of the FreeScout installation. Log in as admin (admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!), navigate to the System > Status page (or System > System Status), and extract the following environment details:

1. FreeScout Version
2. PHP Version
3. Database Version (Engine and Version)
4. Timezone

Compile these details into a JSON file saved at `/home/ga/system_audit.json` with the following keys:
